text.title: Impl Plan Examples Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Impl Plan Examples.

example.scenario: An author adapts the 'multi-file refactor' impl-plan example for a payments-handler split: keeps the dependency-graph shape, replaces 11 task names, recomputes token estimates against the new files, archetype tag = refactor.
example.trace: r1-four-archetypes → r4-archetype-tag → r5-adapt-not-copy → r2-fully-realistic → artefact green
